name: crossloom
description: CrossLoom integration-platform toolkit for external 3TXpert developers. Bundles the CrossLoom MCP server (actions on a live instance), three auto-firing Skills (ObjectType cheat-sheets, first-contact orientation, and first-run connection/env setup), and a SessionStart hook that injects the always-on CrossLoom conventions. Requires Python and the crossloom-cli wheel — see the marketplace README.
